session_1.speaker: Ava
session_1.text: SYNTHETIC FIXTURE: I adopted a grey cat named Biscuit last spring.

session_1.speaker: Ben
session_1.text: SYNTHETIC FIXTURE: Nice! I started pottery classes on Tuesdays.

session_2.text: SYNTHETIC FIXTURE: Biscuit knocked over my blue ceramic vase today.

session_2.text: SYNTHETIC FIXTURE: My pottery teacher moved the class to Thursdays.

qa.question: What is the name of Ava's cat?

session_1.text: SYNTHETIC FIXTURE: I am training for the Riverside half marathon in October.
